description: Magic recipe. Joins with T-S AS 142.6. (data from FGP by Prof. Gidi Bohak). TS 12.102 which is consider to be a join, is probably unconnected directly to this - it contains remains of a kettuba on recto, and a magical text on verso. AA
description_he: מתכון קסמים. מתחבר עם T-S AS 142.6.
